groups.title: Damaged Fridge Report
groups.desc:
Questions 1-10
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: Damaged Fridge Report • Warranty: 3 years • Model: $1$ Mount • Colour: $2$ • Date of purchase: $3$ • Problems: – the non-stop $4$ – $5$ degrees • The repair shop: Ken's Appliance (near to the $6$) • The customer needs to store food for her $7$ shop. • Total value of loss: $8$ $ Things to do: • Ask the $9$ to call back. • Replace the damaged $10$.

questions.title: The customer needs to store food for her 【   】 shop.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Good morning.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Ken's Appliance.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Can I help you?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I'm ringing about my fridge.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It's not working at the moment.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I'd like to find out a few more details, if I may.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Yes, sure.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: First I need to make sure if your fridge is still covered by warranty.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Oh, right.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I bought it just last week and it originally came with 2 years of warranty coverage, but I've extended the period to 3 years.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: So it's definitely under warranty.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Right.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Now, what model is it?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Let me take a look … It should be somewhere on this warranty card.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Oh, here, on the top right-hand corner.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It's a Top Mount.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: And the colour of the fridge?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It's a silver one.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It is really modern and perfectly matches the whole décor of my kitchen.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I've made a note of that.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: So can you tell me the exact date you purchased the fridge?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I remember it was delivered on January 15th.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I must have bought it a couple of days earlier.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Right, it was on the 12th.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Then what is the problem with the fridge?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Oh, it's a complete disaster.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: First there is something wrong with the alarm.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I mean it is beeping continuously, even when the door is shut.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It's really annoying.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: And there's also a problem with its temperature control.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It's now 10 degrees, but I set it to be minus 8.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It seemed to be working fine for the first couple of days.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Sorry about that, but rest assured, Madam.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: We'll fix it all.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Where is your maintenance centre?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Ken's Appliance is located on Elm Street, just a few steps from the station.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: And, did the broken fridge cause any loss to you?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Yes, actually it was used to store food for my sandwich shop.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Any idea of the total value of loss?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Let me make an estimate here.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: The vegetables in the fridge cost me around $50, and the meat cost more than $100.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: So the overall loss is about $180.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I didn't notice the abnormal temperature until something inside went bad and the whole fridge smelled terrible.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I had to toss everything away.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Luckily, no one ate the food inside and got sick.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That's a relief.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: But the damage has really caused me great inconvenience.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I've nowhere to put the raw materials and thus could not open for business these days.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: The longer it takes to fix the fridge, the more it will cost me.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: You know … I have a whole bunch of bills to pay, like water, electricity, rent …

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Don't worry, we'll attend to your problems as soon as possible.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I need to know precisely when you can send a guy to fix all the problems.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It is very urgent.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Is there anyone who can keep me posted on the latest information?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: How about this?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I'll have the manager ring you later.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Does that work for you?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: OK … I'll be expecting his call then.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Do you know what exactly is wrong with the fridge?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: For your case, we assume it's the door that has to be fixed.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: The abnormal temperature and the noisy alarm both indicate that.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Yes, indeed.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I've just noticed that the door is dented.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: It may have to be replaced then.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: But we'll have to check the availability of our repair guy first.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: We'll phone you back later.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: OK, thank you.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: You're welcome.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Bye.

1.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Model、Mount；提示词 Model，此处应填型号名称。
题目解析：本题比较容易定位，难度不大。题干 Mount 首字母大写，属于型号名称的一部分，在录音中不会发生替换，且必定会出现在答案附近。在听到定位词 Model 原词重现后，注意听之后的回答，Mount 之前的词汇即为答案。因此答案为 Top。

2.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Colour；提示词 Colour，此处应填表示颜色的形容词。
题目解析：紧跟上一题，定位词 Colour 原词重现，接着听到回答："It's a silver one."抓取符合预判的词汇即可。因此答案为 silver。注意拼写速度及准确性。另外，在雅思听力中，家用电器的颜色考查最多的词就是 silver（银白色），其他常考的颜色还有 white（白色）和 cream（淡黄色）。

3.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Date；提示词 Date、purchase，此处应填购买日期。
题目解析：本题考查条件限定及信息填写的完整性，是本篇 Part 1 中最容易出错的一道题。注意 purchase 为条件限定，暗示空白处要填写的是购买日期。录音中先听到了 January 15th，这是冰箱送达（delivered）的日期，不符合题干要求，先记下月份，因为第二次出现的时间信息未必是完整的，随后顾客提到的第二个时间信息是 12th，这才是 purchase 的时间。在填写答案时，先写或后写月份都可以，但一定要保证信息的完整性，不能漏掉月份。因此答案为 January 12(th) 或 12(th) January。

4.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Problems；提示词 non-stop，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题考查冰箱出现的其中一个问题。提示词 non-stop 为形容词，在录音中比较容易发生替换。听到 problem 以问句形式出现之后，注意听顾客的回答："First there is something wrong with the alarm."记下符合预判的名词 alarm，随后听到 non-stop 的同义替换 beeping continuously 出现。因此答案为 alarm。在以往的冰箱维修场景中，除了 alarm 之外，常考查的易坏部件还有 fan（风扇）、light 及后面题目中出现的 door。

5.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 degrees，此处应填数字。
题目解析：本题考查冰箱出现的另外一个问题，即温度上的异常。录音中通过 there's also a problem with … 引出了 temperature control 这个问题。随后听到了两个数字，分别是 10 和 minus 8。需要注意的是，空白处要求填写的是异常的温度，在录音中被表述为现在的温度，而 minus 8 是顾客原本设置的正常温度，注意排除干扰。因此答案为 10 或 ten。注意当答案为数字时，写字母或写阿拉伯数字都可以，在符合题目字数要求的情况下，更建议写阿拉伯数字。

6.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Ken's Appliance；提示词 near to、the，此处应填地点类名词。
题目解析：定位词 Ken's Appliance 是专有名词，在录音中不会发生替换，比较容易定位，答案句为："… is located on Elm Street, just a few steps from the station."其中 a few steps from 替换了题干中的 near to。因此答案为 station。

7.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 shop；提示词 shop，此处应填名词或形容词。
题目解析：通过题干可知，空白处答案会出现在顾客的话中，且 shop 不易发生替换。答案句为："… actually it was used to store food for my sandwich shop."答案句与题干相比变化不大，抓取 shop 之前的词汇即可。因此答案为 sandwich。注意答案不可写成复数形式，因为一般情况下都是不可数名词或可数名词的单数形式修饰名词（sports centre 等特例除外）。

8.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Total value、loss；提示词 $，此处应填数字。
题目解析：注意 Total 为条件限定，暗示空白处要填写的是损失的总数额。定位词 Total value 和 loss 原词重现于工作人员的询问中，随后在顾客的回答中首先听到了 50 和 100，分别对应蔬菜费用和肉类费用，为干扰信息，接着听到："So the overall loss is about $180."其中 overall 替换了题干中的 Total。因此答案为 180。数字 180 会出现连读，发音与 190 很像，注意区分和跟读模仿。

9.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 call；提示词 ask、call，此处应填表示人的名词。
题目解析：本题与上一题相隔较远，需耐心往下听，注意抓取符合预判的词汇。在听到顾客询问 "Is there anyone who …" 时，注意听工作人员的回答："I'll have the manager ring you later."其中 have … ring you 替换了题干中的 Ask … to call back，抓取表示人的名词即可。因此答案为 manager。

10.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 damaged，此处应填表示冰箱部件的名词。
题目解析：本题没有很好的定位词，题干中的词都比较容易发生替换。注意通过对话的推进抓取符合题干要求的词汇。题干要求填写冰箱损坏的部件名称，在听到顾客询问 "… what exactly is wrong with the fridge?" 时就应集中注意力，随后听到了 the door … has to be fixed 以及 the door is dented，都对应题干的 damaged，即使不知道 dented 的意思，也可以通过 fixed 大致判断这就是要找的答案，然后再通过 have to be replaced 进行确认。因此答案为 door。
